clips.title: Neon Alley
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, rain-slicked streets, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night, rain. A narrow neon alley dripping with rain, glowing signs in unfamiliar script, steam from vents, puddles mirroring the lights. A person in a techwear jacket stands mid-alley, collar up, glancing back. Hanging cables, a flickering sign, wet trash. High-contrast neon key, deep shadow, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow dolly in. Gritty cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Skydeck
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A rooftop high over a dense neon megacity, endless glowing towers, flying cars streaking between them. Night, hazy. A person in a long coat stands at the ledge overlooking the sprawl, wind tugging the coat. An antenna array, holographic ads below, drifting smog. Neon city glow from below, cinematic grade. 28mm, crane rise. Expansive cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Night Market
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night, steamy. A crowded neon street-food market, glowing stall signs, steam and smoke, dense crowd. Night. A person in a hooded jacket weaves through the market, glancing at a stall, neon on the face. Skewer grills, hanging lanterns, holographic menus. Saturated neon glow, cinematic grade. 35mm, handheld push in. Bustling cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Clinic
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A dim back-alley cyber-clinic, surgical rigs, tangled wires, a glowing monitor. Interior, tense. A person in a tank top sits in the chair, a glowing cybernetic arm exposed, examining it. Surgical arms, a tray of implants, sparks. Cold clinical light with neon spill, cinematic grade. 40mm, slow dolly in. Edgy cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Den
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A cramped hacker den, a wall of glowing monitors and scrolling code, tangled cables, energy drink cans. Interior, focused. A person in a hoodie sits before the screens, hands on a keyboard, screen glow on the face. A headset, sticky notes, blinking routers. Cold monitor glow with magenta accents, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow dolly in. Underground cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Ad Space
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night, rain. A rain-soaked street beneath towering holographic advertisements, giant glowing figures looming over the crowd. Night. A person in a translucent rain poncho stands looking up at the giant holograms, tiny beneath them. Wet pavement, umbrellas, neon reflections. Massive holo glow, cinematic grade. 28mm, static wide. Overwhelming cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Crossing
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night, rain. A busy neon crosswalk in heavy rain, glowing signage, headlights, wet asphalt. Night. A person in a glowing-trim jacket crosses under a clear umbrella, neon reflecting off the wet street. Crowds, a passing hover-bike, puddle ripples. Cool rain with hot neon accents, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow dolly in. Moody cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Courier
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A neon-lit tunnel streaked with light trails, glowing lane markers, wet concrete. Night, fast. A person in an armored riding suit leans into a turn on a glowing hover-motorcycle, visor reflecting neon. Light streaks, warning signs, spray. Streaking neon light, cinematic grade. 35mm, side tracking. Kinetic cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Pulse
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A packed underground nightclub, pulsing neon lasers, fog, a crowd of silhouettes. Night, electric. A person in reflective clubwear dances mid-crowd, arms up, neon washing over them. Laser beams, a DJ booth glow, haze. Pulsing multicolor neon, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow orbit. Electric cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Deal
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night, rain. A shadowy corner beneath a flickering neon sign, rain dripping, a graffiti wall. Night. A person in a hooded coat leans against the wall holding a glowing data-chip, wary, half-lit. A puddle, a discarded crate, drifting steam. Flickering neon with deep shadow, cinematic grade. 50mm, slow dolly in. Noir cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Canal City
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A neon canal district, glowing signs reflected in dark water, arched bridges, moored boats. Night, humid. A person in a long coat stands at a railing over the canal watching the reflections. Hanging wires, a passing boat, neon haze. Neon reflections on water, cinematic grade. 28mm, side tracking. Atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Chrome Eye
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-noir dystopian future, magenta and cyan neon, gritty, cinematic. Night. A close view against a neon-lit street backdrop, bokeh signs behind. Night. A person with a glowing cybernetic eye implant turns toward camera, neon reflecting across the face, faint circuit tattoos. Bokeh neon, a hood edge, drifting rain. Hot neon rim light, cinematic grade. 85mm, slow dolly in. Intimate cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.
